items.question: Is Gaming RGB Software free?
items.answer: Yes! The core software is free and open source. Premium features like cloud sync and the premium effect marketplace are available via subscription.

items.question: Which devices are supported?
items.answer: We support 500+ devices from brands like Razer, Corsair, Logitech, NZXT, ASUS, HyperX, and SteelSeries. Check our Devices page for the full list.

items.question: Which platforms are supported?
items.answer: Gaming RGB Software runs on Windows 10+, macOS 12+, and Ubuntu 20.04+.

items.question: Do I need to uninstall my brand software?
items.answer: No, Gaming RGB Software works alongside your existing brand software. However, for best results, we recommend disabling RGB control in other apps to avoid conflicts.

items.question: How do I create custom lighting effects?
items.answer: Use our visual drag-and-drop Effect Editor — no coding required. You can also import effects from the community marketplace.
